rationale: The cited study is a major meta-analysis producing empirical generalizations on brand-level advertising elasticities (including geography moderators), and the citing paper explicitly frames its contribution as extending cross-national elasticity evidence beyond the largely North-Atlantic base. Given this thematic overlap on elasticity generalizations and cross-country variation, this does not look like a clearly incidental mention from the available evidence (even though only a DOI-level match is provided).
